reviews.author: Kathryn E Collins
reviews.title: Love this float!
reviews.body: We bought this last year for our pool & we absolutely love it! It is truly unsinkable! My granddaughter, 24, was in the pool last week & said that she would love one as a Mother's Day gift so I'm buying it today for her. I have another unsinkable float from a different company that looks like mermaid fins but she didn't want that, she only wanted this one.

reviews.author: Paul M.
reviews.title: Quality pool mat
reviews.body: We live ours but we could have ordered a thinner version and saved some money. Have a plan on where you’ll sore it. It is thick and bulky. That’s not a complaint.

reviews.author: Vincenzo Torrecillas
reviews.title: Great Floating
reviews.body: We ordered these to float on the lake in Virginia. So far, they have held up very well.

reviews.author: Miss Allyn
reviews.title: Pricey but awesome float!
reviews.body: Picked this float up and it was everyone's favorite this summer. Pricey but worth it!

reviews.author: Rosalee Spotts
reviews.title: durbility
reviews.body: AWESOME FLOAT. Love the color and it's thick enough to hold at least 225 lbs.

reviews.author: Adam Coffey
reviews.title: Great price - excellent quality
reviews.body: Great quality at a great price (when compared to similar at Frontgate.

reviews.author: Chuck G. LaCroix Jr.
reviews.title: Great length and flotation for me at 6’2”.
reviews.body: Great length and flotation for me at 6’2”.

reviews.author: Natascha Heckens
reviews.title: Great product.
reviews.body: I love this mat. It actually keeps you afloat.

reviews.author: Scott H.
reviews.title: Look nice
reviews.body: Look nice. Comfortable.

reviews.author: Mr.Mayor
reviews.title: Wow - I am impressed
reviews.body: I live in Texas. It’s HOT. This mat keeps me on top of the water and is comfortable. I have purchased 5 of there through years and decided to go with the bigger one. Honestly, I had a an issue with it. Not because it’s a bad product but because things happen and no product is perfect. But the customer service was perfect. I can not express how incredibly impressed I am with how this company operates. I spent a career of servicing and creating a great customer experience. If I was not retired, I would have traveled to meet this team and learn how they work. Well done.

reviews.author: nunyawtf
reviews.title: Thick!
reviews.body: So thick and buoyant! But sometimes hard to get on because I can’t force it under water. Would be excellent for strong heavy men

reviews.author: Sanslanommer
reviews.title: Worth the price?
reviews.body: I guess the answer is yes. It’s solid and comfortable but I would’ve bought two if the price had been right

reviews.author: Zan
reviews.title: Works great in pool
reviews.body: Like it a little hard to get on

reviews.author: carol h
reviews.title: Slippery!
reviews.body: My husband and I almost fell when we used it inside and walked on it. It is like walking on ice. Beware!

reviews.author: Carla Marie Conarpe
reviews.title: Not long lasting
reviews.body: Nice floats, very comfortable but they crack after a few years.

reviews.author: ANDERSON
reviews.title: Works great
reviews.body: Love this. So soft and comfortable. Works great in pool.

reviews.author: Kiley Mcclintic
reviews.title: Sturdy
reviews.body: I got this for an elderly lady and it’s perfect! Sturdy and easy to get in.

reviews.author: Katherine Bratcher
reviews.title: Great pool float
reviews.body: I bought this as a gift for my cousin, who practically lives in her pool all summer. She couldn’t be happier with it!

reviews.author: Jamie Lee Kelly
reviews.title: THE BOMB 💣
reviews.body: So fun! Buy more than just two or you & your friends will be fighting over who gets one😂

reviews.author: Jessica
reviews.title: Best Pool Float Ever!
reviews.body: Definitely invest in one of these for all your leisurely pool needs. I bought one of these and took it on a lazy river. Looked like a straight up queen rolling down the river on this thing. You don’t get wet because this floatie sits pretty high up, and there’s a cup holder for all your day drinking needs. Everyone was jealous and tried to swipe my ride.

reviews.author: darkhate668
reviews.title: Very nice!!
reviews.body: Super comfortable, keeps you dry if you just like to float and not get wet, a lot bigger and higher than the picture, very easy to inflate....especially with a pump...it took literally 2 minutes to inflate!!

reviews.author: sarah wiebe
reviews.title: So comfortable
reviews.body: This float is ideal for reading while floating in the pool. Unlike most pool floats this one helps you sit more upright.

reviews.author: Dragonhlm
reviews.title: better than Intex floating recliner
reviews.body: This is the best floating recliner I have purchased. Stop looking and buy this one!

reviews.author: Gary A. Boneberg
reviews.title: pool toy
reviews.body: My wife loves it for reading in the pool.

reviews.author: leslie ameen
reviews.title: Very durable
reviews.body: Best float ever

reviews.author: Stacy
reviews.title: Great pool float
reviews.body: Great for floating in the pool and still being able to talk to everyone. I always hate lying down and trying to carry on conversations. It's good for being able to sit up and read while floating. For more comfort, it would be better if it had a slight tilt to the back. It's pretty straight up and down

reviews.author: Lori Wojtanowski
reviews.title: Ok not crazy about it
reviews.body: Would like this product more if it laid back more. Have to sit in upright position

reviews.author: Julie S
reviews.title: Comfy but small
reviews.body: I like the float but was much smaller than I thought

reviews.author: LyleVW
reviews.title: works well
reviews.body: Our nightly visit is floating in the pool with a liquid refreshment. I have one but wanted a 2nd for company. This seems to hold up both humans and to use.

reviews.author: melissa Swanson
reviews.title: Very light but good quality going to order more will fit easily in suitcase if going on vacA
reviews.body: Amazing quality and price. Carried in my suitcase big hit on vacation.

reviews.author: EricT
reviews.title: love this!
reviews.body: exactly what i expected and works great in the pool! i love it.

reviews.author: Kevin
reviews.title: Works very well to float on.
reviews.body: Just hanging out at the lake.

reviews.author: Tammy
reviews.title: Like the Whale Tail
reviews.body: Good quality. I would purchase again.
